---
title: "Comparing USGS to Thesis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r, load packages and load up working directory}

library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(Rmisc)
library(rstatix)
library(tidyr)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)
library(stringr)
library(readxl)

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = 'C:/Users/savan/OneDrive - San Francisco State University/ProjectData/GitHub/DepositionSFB/data')
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r, cleaning data}
# load data
sed_thesis<- read.csv("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\data\\thesis_sed.csv")

sed_usgs <-read.csv("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\data\\usgs_SFB_sediment_pad_data.csv")

str(sed_thesis)

str(sed_usgs)
```

```{r, cleaning data thesis}

# Clean whitespace from character columns only
sed_thesis$Season   <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Season, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Dist <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Dist, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Tran <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Tran, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Year     <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Year, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Month    <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Month, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Site    <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Site, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Replicate    <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Replicate, " ", "")

# Convert types
sed_thesis$Flux     <- as.numeric(sed_thesis$Flux)
sed_thesis$Flux     <- round(sed_thesis$Flux)
sed_thesis$Year     <- as.character(sed_thesis$Year)
sed_thesis$Dist <- as.numeric(sed_thesis$Dist)
sed_thesis$Date.removed.from.field <-as.Date(sed_thesis$Date.removed.from.field,format = "%m/%d/%Y")
sed_thesis$Date.placed.in.field <-as.Date(sed_thesis$Date.placed.in.field,format = "%m/%d/%Y")
sed_thesis$Study.Phase     <- as.character(sed_thesis$Study.Phase)

str(sed_thesis)

```

```{r,cleaning data usgs}

# Clean whitespace from character columns only
sed_usgs$Season   <- str_replace_all(sed_usgs$Season, " ", "")
sed_usgs$Dist <- str_replace_all(sed_usgs$Dist, " ", "")
sed_usgs$Tran <- str_replace_all(sed_usgs$Tran, " ", "")
sed_usgs$Year     <- str_replace_all(sed_usgs$Year, " ", "")
sed_usgs$Month    <- str_replace_all(sed_usgs$Month, " ", "")
sed_usgs$Site    <- str_replace_all(sed_usgs$Site, " ", "")
sed_usgs$Replicate    <- str_replace_all(sed_usgs$Replicate, " ", "")

# Convert types
sed_usgs$Flux     <- as.numeric(sed_usgs$Flux)
sed_usgs$Flux     <- round(sed_usgs$Flux)
sed_usgs$Year     <- as.character(sed_usgs$Year)
sed_usgs$Dist <- as.numeric(sed_usgs$Dist)
sed_usgs$Date.removed.from.field <-as.Date(sed_usgs$Date.removed.from.field,format = "%m/%d/%Y")
sed_usgs$Date.placed.in.field <-as.Date(sed_usgs$Date.placed.in.field,format = "%m/%d/%Y")

str(sed_usgs)
```

```{r, double check variables}

unique(sed_usgs$Site)
unique(sed_thesis$Site)
```

```{r, statistics thesis}

#within all the data
sed_thesis_mean <- mean(sed_thesis$Flux, na.rm = TRUE)
sed_thesis_mean
sed_thesis_max  <- max(sed_thesis$Flux, na.rm = TRUE)
sed_thesis_max
sed_thesis_min  <- min(sed_thesis$Flux, na.rm = TRUE)
sed_thesis_min
sed_thesis_sd <-sd(sed_thesis$Flux, na.rm =TRUE)
sed_thesis_sd

#sed_stats_site <- sed_thesis %>%
 # group_by(Site) %>%
 # summarise(
   # mean = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
   # max  = max(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
  #  min  = min(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
   # sd   = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE))
#sed_stats_site

```

```{r, statistics usgs}


#within all the data
sed_usgs_mean <- mean(sed_usgs$Flux, na.rm = TRUE)
sed_usgs_mean
sed_usgs_max  <- max(sed_usgs$Flux, na.rm = TRUE)
sed_usgs_max
sed_usgs_min  <- min(sed_usgs$Flux, na.rm = TRUE)
sed_usgs_min
sed_usgs_sd <-sd(sed_usgs$Flux, na.rm =TRUE)
sed_usgs_sd

#sed_stats_site <- sed_usgs %>%
 # group_by(Site) %>%
 # summarise(
   # mean = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
   # max  = max(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
  #  min  = min(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
   # sd   = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE))
#sed_stats_site

```

```{r, searching for sample dates in usgs}

# Corte Madera Site

sed_usgs %>% 
  filter(Site== "CorteMadera") %>%
  pull(Date.placed.in.field) %>% 
  unique() 

sed_usgs %>% 
  filter(Site== "CorteMadera") %>%
  pull(Date.removed.from.field) %>% 
  unique() 

# San Pablo Site

sed_usgs %>% 
  filter(Site== "SanPablo") %>%
  pull(Date.placed.in.field) %>% 
  unique() 

sed_usgs %>% 
  filter(Site== "SanPablo") %>%
  pull(Date.removed.from.field) %>% 
  unique() 

```

```         
```

```{r, thesis and usgs adding marsh edge type and orientation}

sed_thesis <- sed_thesis %>% 
  mutate(marsh_edge_type = case_when(
    Site %in% c("CorteMadera", "GiantMarsh") ~ "Scarped", 
    Site %in% c("Buck'sLanding", "SanPablo") ~ "Ramped", 
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  ))

sed_thesis <- sed_thesis %>% 
  mutate(marsh_orientation = case_when(
    Site %in% c("CorteMadera", "Buck'sLanding") ~ "East.facing", 
    Site %in% c("SanPablo") ~ "South.facing", 
    Site %in% c("GiantMarsh") ~ "West.facing", 
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  ))


sed_usgs <- sed_usgs %>% 
  mutate(marsh_edge_type = case_when(
    Site %in% c("CorteMadera") ~ "Scarped", 
    Site %in% c("SanPablo") ~ "Ramped", 
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  ))

sed_usgs <- sed_usgs %>% 
  mutate(marsh_orientation = case_when(
    Site %in% c("CorteMadera") ~ "East.facing", 
    Site %in% c("SanPablo") ~ "South.facing", 
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  ))


```

```{r, changing the seasons to just Winter and Summer based on Lacy 2020 and Thorne 2022}


sed_thesis <- sed_thesis %>%
  mutate(
    Month = as.character(Month), # convert to plain character first 
    Season = case_when(
    Month %in% c("November", "December", "January", "February") ~ "Winter", 
    Month %in% c("March", "April", "May", "June", "July", "August", "September", "October") ~ "Summer", 
    TRUE  ~NA_character_
    ))


sed_usgs <- sed_usgs %>%
  mutate(
    Month = as.character(Month), # convert to plain character first 
    Season = case_when(
    Month %in% c("November", "December", "January", "February") ~ "Winter", 
    Month %in% c("March", "April", "May", "June", "July", "August", "September", "October") ~ "Summer", 
    TRUE  ~NA_character_
    ))
```

```{r, creating a "Study Dataset" column}

sed_thesis$Study.Dataset <- "Thesis"

sed_usgs$Study.Dataset <- "USGS"


```

```{r, changing transect for thesis}

sed_thesis <- sed_thesis %>% 
  mutate(
    Tran = case_when(
      Tran == "1" ~ "T1", 
      Tran == "2" ~ "T2", 
      TRUE ~ Tran
    
  ))

```

```{r, combining thesis and usgs}

colnames(sed_thesis)
colnames(sed_usgs)
```

```{r, adding a Study Phase to usgs}

  colnames(sed_usgs)


 #If your dates look like "01/15/2023" (MM/DD/YYYY)
#sed_usgs <- sed_usgs %>%
  #mutate(Date.placed.in.field = as.Date(Date.placed.in.field, format = "%m/%d/%Y"))
  #mutate(Date.removed.from.field = as.Date(Date.removed.from.field, format = "%m/%d/%Y"))


sed_usgs <- sed_usgs %>% 
  mutate(Study.Phase = case_when(
    # CorteMadera
    Site == "CorteMadera" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("6/29/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("7/27/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M1",
    Site == "CorteMadera" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("7/27/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("8/24/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M2",
    Site == "CorteMadera" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("8/24/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("9/21/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M3",
    Site == "CorteMadera" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("9/21/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("10/25/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M4",
    Site == "CorteMadera" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("10/25/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("11/30/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M5",
    Site == "CorteMadera" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("11/30/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("12/21/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M6",
    Site == "CorteMadera" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("12/21/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("1/18/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M7",
    Site == "CorteMadera" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("1/18/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("2/17/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M8",
    Site == "CorteMadera" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("2/17/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("3/23/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M9",
    Site == "CorteMadera" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("3/23/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("4/20/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M10",
    Site == "CorteMadera" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("4/20/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("5/18/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M11",
    Site == "CorteMadera" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("5/18/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("6/20/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M12",
    # SanPablo
    Site == "SanPablo" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("6/30/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("7/28/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M1",
    Site == "SanPablo" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("7/28/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("8/25/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M2",
    Site == "SanPablo" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("8/25/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("9/22/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M3",
    Site == "SanPablo" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("9/22/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("10/26/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M4",
    Site == "SanPablo" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("10/26/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("11/22/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M5",
    Site == "SanPablo" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("11/22/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("12/20/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M6",
    Site == "SanPablo" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("12/20/2022", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("1/17/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M7",
    Site == "SanPablo" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("1/17/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("2/15/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M8",
    Site == "SanPablo" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("2/15/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("3/23/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M9",
    Site == "SanPablo" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("3/23/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("4/21/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M10",
    Site == "SanPablo" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("4/21/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("5/19/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M11",
    Site == "SanPablo" & Date.placed.in.field >= as.Date("5/19/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") & Date.removed.from.field <= as.Date("6/21/2023", format = "%m/%d/%Y") ~ "M12",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  ))

sed_thesis$Study.Phase    <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Study.Phase, " ", "")
sed_usgs$Study.Phase    <- str_replace_all(sed_usgs$Study.Phase, " ", "")
```

```{r}
# 1. Check the column name is correct
colnames(sed_usgs)

# 2. Check what the dates actually look like
head(sed_usgs$Date.placed.in.field)  # replace date_column with your actual column name
head(sed_usgs$Date.removed.from.field)  # replace date_column with your actual column name

# 3. Check what class it is
class(sed_usgs$Date.placed.in.field)  # replace date_column with your actual column name
class(sed_usgs$Date.removed.from.field)  # replace date_column with your actual column name
```

```{r, merging usgs and thesis}

#usgs_thesis <-bind_rows(sed_thesis, sed_usgs)

usgs_thesis_clean <- usgs_thesis %>%
  filter(Tran %in% c("A", "B", "T1", "T2"))



head(usgs_thesis)
nrow(sed_thesis)
nrow(sed_usgs)
nrow(usgs_thesis)

unique(usgs_thesis$Study.Phase)
unique(sed_thesis$Study.Phase)
unique(sed_usgs$Study.Phase) 

```

```{r}
colnames(usgs_thesis)

#usgs_thesis_M1_M12 <- usgs_thesis %>%
  #filter(Study.Phase %in% c("M1", "M2", "M3", "M4", "M5", "M6", 
                            # "M7", "M8", "M9", "M10", "M11", "M12"))

unique(usgs_thesis$Study.Phase)
```

```{r}
usgs_thesis_m1_m6 <-usgs_thesis_clean %>% 
    filter(Study.Phase %in% c("M1", "M2", "M3", "M4", "M5", "M6"))

unique(usgs_thesis_m1_m6$Study.Phase)

usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150 <- usgs_thesis_m1_m6 %>%
  dplyr::filter(!Dist %in% c(150))


getwd()
browseURL(getwd())
```

```{r, filter by marsh edge type, usgs and thesis}
sd(usgs_thesis$Flux, na.rm = TRUE)

ramped_ut <-filter(usgs_thesis, marsh_edge_type == "Ramped")
ramped_ut

scarped_ut <-filter(usgs_thesis, marsh_edge_type == "Scarped")
scarped_ut


```

```{r, flux with usgs values marsh edge type}

sd(sed_usgs$Flux, na.rm = TRUE)

ramped_usgs <-filter(sed_usgs, marsh_edge_type == "Ramped")
ramped_usgs

scarped_usgs <-filter(sed_usgs, marsh_edge_type == "Scarped")
scarped_usgs


```

```{r, flux with thesis values marsh edge type}
sd(sed_thesis$Flux, na.rm = TRUE)

ramped_thesis <-filter(sed_usgs, marsh_edge_type == "Ramped")
ramped_thesis

scarped_thesis <-filter(sed_usgs, marsh_edge_type == "Scarped")
scarped_thesis


```

```         
```

```{r}



```

```{r, shapiro test with log flux}





```

```{r, general linear mixed models}
library(glmmTMB)

model1 <- glmmTMB(Flux~Replicate + (1| Site/Tran/Dist), 
        family = gaussian(link = "identity"),  #handles negatives
                  data = usgs_thesis)

summary(model1)
anova(model1)
```

```{r, model 2}

m1 <- lmer(Flux ~ log(Dist + 1) + (1|Site/Tran), data = sed_thesis)
m1

summary(sed_thesis$Flux)
summary(sed_thesis$Dist)

```

```{r, mean values per Study phase, usgs and thesis}

usgs_thesis_m1_m6 %>%
  group_by(Site, Tran, Study.Phase, Month) %>%
  summarise(AvgFlux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")


sed_thesis %>% 
  group_by(Site, Tran, Study.Phase, Month) %>% 
  summarise(AvgFlux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
# Check how many rows you have
nrow(usgs_thesis_m1_m6)

# Check what unique values exist in each grouping column
unique(usgs_thesis_m1_m6$Site)
unique(usgs_thesis_m1_m6$Tran)
unique(usgs_thesis_m1_m6$Study.Phase)

# Check the structure of the data
str(usgs_thesis_m1_m6)
```

```{r}
result <- usgs_thesis_m1_m6 %>%
  group_by(Site, Tran, Study.Phase) %>%
  summarise(avg_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Check how many rows the result has
nrow(result)

# View the full result
View(result)

colnames(usgs_thesis_m1_m6)

colnames(usgs_thesis_m1_m6) <- trimws(colnames(usgs_thesis_m1_m6))
```

```{r}
 
colnames(sed_thesis)

# Check unique values in each grouping column
unique(sed_thesis$Site)
unique(sed_thesis$Tran)
unique(sed_thesis$Study.Phase)
unique(sed_thesis$Month)

# Check Flux column
summary(sed_thesis$Flux)

sed_thesis$Site <- trimws(sed_thesis$Site)
sed_thesis$Tran <- trimws(sed_thesis$Tran)
sed_thesis$Month <- trimws(sed_thesis$Month)
```

```{r}
result <- sed_thesis %>% 
  group_by(Site, Tran, Study.Phase, Month) %>% 
  summarise(AvgFlux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

nrow(result)
View(result)

# 1. How many rows in sed_thesis?
nrow(sed_thesis)

# 2. Try the simplest possible group_by with just ONE column
sed_thesis %>%
  group_by(Site) %>%
  summarise(AvgFlux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE))

est_result <- sed_thesis %>%
  group_by(Site) %>%
  summarise(AvgFlux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE))

```
